subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God! Verily, you are Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatsoever lies between them. You give lordship to whom you will and take lordship from whom you will
subcodes.first_line_orig: الله اکبر. قل اللهم انک انت صحاب السموات و الارض و ما بینهما لتؤتین الصحبة من تشآء
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God
